name: netsuite-edi
description: NetSuite SuiteQL queries for EDI customer and transaction analytics via local API Gateway. Query EDI trading partners, transaction volumes, dollar amounts, and document type breakdowns.

gateway_url.title: API Gateway URL
gateway_url.description: NetSuite API Gateway URL. Production: https://api.twistedx.com

api_key.title: Gateway API Key
api_key.description: X-API-Key secret for server-to-server access to the gateway.

netsuite_account.title: NetSuite Account
netsuite_account.description: Account to query: 'twistedx' (Twisted X, OAuth 1.0a, account 4138030) or 'dutyman' (Dutyman, OAuth 2.0, account 8055418). Default: twistedx

netsuite_environment.title: NetSuite Environment
netsuite_environment.description: Environment to query: 'production', 'sandbox', or 'sandbox2'. Dutyman only supports production and sandbox. Default: production

tools.name: netsuite_run_suiteql
tools.description: Execute a raw SuiteQL query against NetSuite via the API Gateway

tools.name: netsuite_list_edi_customers
tools.description: List EDI-enabled customers with trading partner info and transaction counts

tools.name: netsuite_search_edi_customer
tools.description: Search for an EDI customer by company name, customer number, or internal ID

tools.name: netsuite_edi_trading_partners
tools.description: List all EDI trading partners with transaction counts by document type

tools.name: netsuite_edi_volume_by_customer
tools.description: EDI transaction counts grouped by trading partner for a date range

tools.name: netsuite_edi_dollars_by_customer
tools.description: EDI dollar amounts grouped by trading partner for a date range

tools.name: netsuite_edi_summary_by_period
tools.description: EDI transaction summary aggregated by month or week with doc type breakdown

tools.name: netsuite_edi_document_breakdown
tools.description: EDI transaction counts broken down by document type (850, 856, 810, etc.)

tools.name: netsuite_edi_top_customers
tools.description: Top EDI trading partners ranked by transaction volume or revenue

tools.name: netsuite_edi_transaction_detail
tools.description: Get individual EDI transaction records for a partner or date range

tools.name: netsuite_edi_recent_activity
tools.description: Most recent EDI transactions across all trading partners
